details.test: Task 1: Order cheapest chocolate birthday cake (serves 8-10) with inscription
Task 2: Add two different birthday cakes under a price limit to the cart
Task 3: Customize a 3-tier cake with inscription and delivery date
Task 4: Select mid-priced cake with free delivery and high rating from search results
Task 5: Add three different same-day delivery items to the cart
Task 6: Add two different cakes over min total and apply promo SWEET10
Task 7: Save three cakes to wishlist, then add cheapest to cart and set quantity 2
Task 8: Replace one birthday cake in the cart with another from the same category
Task 9: Complete guest checkout with shipping and card details
